title: Bitter Creamy Ukrainian Pear Borscht
description: A unique twist on the traditional Ukrainian dish, featuring the sweetness of pears and a tangy kick of bitter greens. Perfect for a comforting meal prep.

ingredients.name: bitter greens (such as dandelion or kale)

instructions: Blanch the grated beets, carrots, and cabbage in boiling water for 5 minutes, then rinse with cold water to stop cooking.
In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in a little water until softened.
Add the blanched vegetables, sour cream, apple cider vinegar, dill, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Add the chopped bitter greens and stir to combine.
Add the vegetable broth to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the borscht simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the borscht hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill.
